name: afk
description: Intelligent permission layer for Claude Code. Learns your patterns, handles AFK mode, defers destructive actions, never lets Claude stall.
author: Simple Inc

commands.name: afk
commands.description: Toggle AFK mode on/off or set a duration

commands.name: afk:review
commands.description: Open AFK web dashboard in browser

commands.name: afk:stats
commands.description: Show today's decision summary in terminal

commands.name: afk:rules
commands.description: List, add, or remove static rules

commands.name: afk:reset
commands.description: Clear decision history and start fresh
